form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 0.5 len at this track Rtg 72+ March 21 over 1000m defeating Black Ora with 55.5kg at $3.40. The race before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 8 at this track Rtg 66+ on March 14 over 1000m, head behind Pingers with 58.5kg at $3.30. Hard to knock his recent form and this looks a winnable race yet again.
